meaning: v.(strike的过去分词,见 strike)adj.被打中的,遭殃的,患病的
examples: Medical supplies are being dropped into the stricken area.
The Red Cross has sent four planeloads of relief supplies to the stricken areas.
We went to the aid of the stricken boat.
President Bush said Tuesday that U.S. aid was already making its way to the stricken country.
Roosevelt was stricken with polio at his summer home on the Canadian island of Campobello.
